summary: Iteration 240 - Multi-Civilization Star Charts, Harmonic Memory, Haptic Sync, PWA Offline Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All code verified. New features: Culture Layers API (3 endpoints), Harmonic Memory API (2 endpoints), Hopi star culture added to star_cultures_data.json, HAPTIC_PATTERNS exported from usePhonicResonance, Service Worker with SOLFEGGIO_FREQUENCIES wave tables.

issues: Trial modal appears on login - expected behavior for test user with concluded trial

critical_code_review_comments: culture_layers.py: GET /api/culture-layers/ returns 3 layers (hopi, egyptian, vedic) with metadata
culture_layers.py: GET /api/culture-layers/{layer_id} returns full constellation data with teachings
phonic.py lines 220-285: POST /api/phonic/record-harmonic records harmonic bookmarks with pair_key
phonic.py: GET /api/phonic/harmonic-memory returns memories with closeness_factor and suggested_angle_offset
star_cultures_data.json: Hopi culture added with 3 constellations (Hotomkam, Tsootsma, Blue Star Kachina)
usePhonicResonance.js: getIntervalType function maps frequency ratios to interval types
usePhonicResonance.js: useProximityHarmonics uses HAPTIC_PATTERNS for interval-specific vibration
NebulaPlayground.js: Fetches harmonic-memory and applies closeness_factor to initial positions (lines 140, 157-158)
NebulaPlayground.js: Records harmonic bookmarks after 3s of sustained >0.6 intensity (lines 194-210)
sw.js: generateWaveTable function creates sine wave samples for offline audio
CultureLayerPanel.js: Component exists with data-testid='culture-layer-panel' (not yet integrated into StarChart)
SovereignCrossbar.js: Positioned at top-12 (48px) - confirmed not overlapping Navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 240 verified: (1) Culture Layers API: GET /api/culture-layers/ returns 3 layers (hopi, egyptian, vedic), GET /api/culture-layers/{id} returns full constellation data with teachings. (2) Harmonic Memory API: POST /api/phonic/record-harmonic records bookmarks, GET /api/phonic/harmonic-memory returns memories with closeness_factor (0-0.8) and suggested_angle_offset. (3) Hopi star culture added to star_cultures_data.json with 3 constellations. (4) HAPTIC_PATTERNS exported from usePhonicResonance.js with interval-specific vibration patterns (unison, second, third, fourth, fifth, octave). (5) Service Worker sw.js has SOLFEGGIO_FREQUENCIES array and generateWaveTable function for PWA offline audio. (6) CultureLayerPanel component created with data-testid but NOT YET integrated into StarChart page - ready for injection. (7) NebulaPlayground fetches harmonic-memory and applies closeness_factor to initial sphere positions. (8) SovereignCrossbar confirmed at top-12 (48px), Navigation at top-0 - no overlap.
